jsonLd.title: Senior Plant Manager at Marico
jsonLd.description:
Marico has an exciting opening for a Plant Manager at our Madurai office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Marico:
Marico is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Marico!
